accent_strategy.description: One restrained vermilion signal marking the danger that should have stopped the system.

dominant_mass_strategy.description: A deep blue chamber mass occupying the right side like institutional tolerance made physical.

historical_anchor.description: A booster seal reduced to one emblematic ring that has already shown damage too many times.

final.negative_prompt: high detail, texture, noise, photoreal clutter, multiple subjects, complex background, dramatic lighting, motion blur, busy composition, ornate realism, dense foliage detail, complex sky, center-weighted composition, symmetrical layout, multiple bright accents, text, watermark, logo, ui overlay
final.prompt: Minimal surreal editorial composition. Quiet, reduced, asymmetrical image with one subtle breach in reality and high thumbnail clarity. The frame should feel paused, suspended, and slightly unresolved. The historical subject must remain legible but reduced to an emblematic silhouette. Strip forms to simple silhouettes and essential geometry only. Use one dominant environmental color field and keep every secondary tone muted or neutral. One side must carry the visual weight while the opposite side stays mostly empty. Reserve one saturated accent as a semantic signal rather than decoration. Keep surfaces quiet with only slight painterly bleed at edges. Hold the image in stillness so it feels like a paused system state with implied consequence. Maintain at least 60% negative space with an asymmetrical focal mass. Use no more than 4 colors and only 1 saturated accent. Allow exactly 1 surreal breach and keep everything else coherent. Lighting must remain soft diffuse. Do not include text, logo, ui_artifacts, motion_blur, photoreal_clutter. Editorial finish pass. Keep the scene calm, legible, and emotionally compressed without adding detail. Historical anchor: A booster seal reduced to one emblematic ring that has already shown damage too many times.. Historical topic: O-ring erosion normalized. Single surreal breach: The ring never fully closes, but the rest of the scene stays calm and institutional.. Caption safety: keep the top UI band clear at x=0.00-1.00, y=0.00-0.12 and keep critical subject matter out of the subtitle band at x=0.08-0.92, y=0.74-0.96. Hero subject: A solitary O-ring-like seal held off-center as a reduced piece of consequential hardware.. Subject archetype: seal_joint. Dominant mass: A deep blue chamber mass occupying the right side like institutional tolerance made physical.. Accent: One restrained vermilion signal marking the danger that should have stopped the system.. Reflection: A matte mirrored plane that gives the seal a quiet double without literalizing the environment.. Single subject in mind only; no source references are used. Scene intent: Keep the seal legible as hardware while the composition reads as a calm system learning the wrong lesson..
